name: Cheesy Asparagus Boboli
recipeIngredient: 6 medium asparagus spears; cook and cut
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the mayo, parmesan cheese, and dry mustard.
2. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the mayo mixture.
4. Arrange the cooked and cut asparagus on top of the boboli shells.
5. Spoon the mayo mixture over the asparagus.
6. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet at 450°F for about 8 to 10 minutes, or until puffed and lightly browned.
